other_observers: Jeanne Mitchell; Yes , I was original finder.
specific_location: 75 yards south of the banding station , Chico Basin Ranch , along a drainage ditch with some water from a spring.
description: Small spizella type sparrow with unmarked pale grayish breast ,gray face , pale eye ring , pink bill and reddish brown crown stripe.Behaviors: Actively feeding along a drainage ditch in small willows and grasses with other sparrow species with White-crowned the predominant . Small size in comparison to White-crowned noticeable.Call: None given.Plumage: adult
